title: SB 1120 protects patients from Artificial Intelligence by requiring physicians to make the final decisions on what kind of treatments patients receive rather than AI
prompt_preview:

Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "SB 1120 requires physicians to make the final decisions on the treatments patients receive rather than AI.",
    "Artificial intelligence is increasingly utilized in diagnosing and treating patients.",
    "An algorithm may not fully know and understand a patient's medical history and needs, potentially leading to erroneous or biased decisions on medical treatment.",
    "The Physicians Make Decisions Act ensures that the human element will always determine the quality of medical treatments for patients.",
    "Health insurance plans have increasingly relied on AI to streamline the processing of claims and prior authorization requests.",
    "There are legitimate concerns about inaccuracies and biases in the use of AI in healthcare.",
    "Wrongful denial of insurance claims based on AI algorithms can lead to serious health consequences and even death.",
    "Leading healthcare organizations have called for oversight over the use of AI in insurance.",
    "The Physicians Make Decisions Act mandates that denial, delay, or modification of healthcare services based on medical necessity must be made by a licensed physician or other competent healthcare provider.",
    "The bill commits companies using AI in their utilization review process to fair and equitable standards.",
    "SB 1120 seeks to uphold the integrity of the healthcare system and prioritize patients' well-being."
  ]
}
```
